message:
feat(stdlib): add builtins, typing_extensions, importlib modules

- builtins: all builtin functions (print, len, range, enumerate, etc.),
  all exception types, all warning types, constants
- typing_extensions: modern typing features (Annotated, ParamSpec, etc.)
- importlib: importlib, importlib.abc, resources, metadata, util, machinery
- pkgutil: package utilities
- runpy: run modules
- venv: virtual environment
- zipimport: zip file importing
- compileall: compile all modules
- py_compile: compile individual files

files.patch:
@@ -155,6 +155,15 @@ const html_parser_mod = @import("../html_parser_mod.zig");

 const xml_sax_mod = @import("../xml_sax_mod.zig");
 const xml_dom_mod = @import("../xml_dom_mod.zig");

+const typing_extensions_mod = @import("../typing_extensions_mod.zig");

 const ModuleMap = std.StaticStringMap(FuncMap).initComptime(.{
     .{ "json", JsonFuncs },

 /// Try to dispatch module function call (e.g., json.loads, numpy.array)
